creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
graphics/openorienteering-mapper: Update to 0.9.5 and prepare to proj8

- Update to 0.9.5
- Use patch from https://github.com/OpenOrienteering/mapper/pull/1994 to use with proj8 see bug #258313 (built fine also with proj7 in ports
- rm patch-src_core_objects_object.h and patch-src_gui_print__tool.cpp
- fix patch-src_sensors_CMakeLists.txt
- update pkg-plist
